title: Do You Love Your Mom and Her Two-Hit Multi-Target Attacks?
sourceNotes: Single-cour 12-episode TV anime (J.C. Staff, 2019). Sourced from Dachima Inaka's light novel (11 volumes, 79 chapters, complete) rather than the separate 5-volume/30-chapter manga adaptation, since AniList's ADAPTATION edge on the anime points to the novel. The finale wraps up with the tower-ascent climax, ending with light novel Volume 3; chapter boundary is approximated at ~7 chapters/volume since no official episode-to-chapter guide was found. A 1-episode OVA ('Do You Love Your Mom on the Shore?') was bundled with the Blu-ray release but is not a theatrical film, so it is omitted here. No distinct named story arcs, so broad season-based entries are used.
